entry.title: Forgive Me God, For I Have Figured It Out
entry.summary:
Author: tomatosoupforthesoul

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,504Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "He's in Buck's bed. On Buck's far too expensive and ridiculously soft sheets. Spread out in a way that's far too vulnerable, exposed in ways he's never thought about before..." Or, Buck and Eddie may have figured it out, but Eddie's guilt and Catholic upbringing are never truly gone...

entry.title: You're A Liability (You're A Little Much For Me)
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherWriterInTheDark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,491Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 94

Summary: After the tsunami hit LA ,Buck is having a hard time trusting himself again. He feels like he is slowly slipping trough the cracks and he is doing it all alone. All he wants is to go back to his family, to be a part of the team again, to be where he belongs. But what if they don’t want him back? What if they don’t trust him either?…This is my take on how I think the tsunami-and-Buck-suing-the-department storyline would have effected him and his relationship with Eddie, Chris and the 118. I often feel like they should have made Buck suffer more in the aftermath. (sorry not sorry) Oh also I scratched the whole underground fighting storyline because it gives me the ick. (gave Eddie something else to cry about though) xx

entry.title: i always wanted a brother (i still remember my mother)
entry.summary:
Author: paramaydic

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,110Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 93

Summary: When he gets close enough, Chris can see that the paper he is clutching in his tiny hands is a card. A really badly coloured card, with a stick figure drawing of a woman and a much smaller figure with blond hair.Oh.Chris gets it before Theo even says the words.“Mrs. Tina said it’s mother’s day on Sunday. We made cards,” Theo explains, his voice lacking the usual enthusiasm.Chris has no idea what to say. He might relate, but that only makes it worse because he knows that there isn’t a thing you can say to make a child feel better after losing a parent. It just sucks, and there is no real fix for it.OR,With Mother's Day coming up, Theo misses his mom. Chris knows a thing or two about that.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: contact high (madforyou)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,793Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Eddie touches Buck a lot.It’s a thing they do, has been for years, and it’s not a big deal. Eddie’s an affectionate guy. Side hugs and arm grabs and that move where Eddie steers him through doorways with a hand on his lower back.All of which Buck has never spent any real time considering because it’s just Eddie, it’s just how he is. Eddie touches people and Buck just happens to be the person standing next to him most of the time, so it’s aimed at him most of the time. Proximity and frequency, that’s all. A coincidence.They’re close. They always have been. So what?All that being said, there is one thing Eddie doesn’t do.Eddie doesn’t kiss Buck.Or — didn’t. Past tense, until about thirty seconds ago, when Eddie leaned across their table at the diner they’re currently eating at and pressed his mouth to Buck’s cheek like the kiss was just another item on a list of things he was doing that afternoon.Or, The totally natural and platonic long-term friendship escalation of kissing your best friend on multiple parts of his body without explanation.

entry.title: The 98th Act
entry.summary:
Author: butterbeeranddirewolves

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,466Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 55

Summary: "Is there a history of cancer within your family?"   Buck felt his heart stop.   OR,   There was something wrong with Theo. The unapologetically chaotic boy was gone, replaced by someone who Buck didn’t recognise. Someone who was tired all the time, someone who was pale and pushed around his food at the dinner table. A shell of himself. Something was wrong with Theo, and Buck went to bed every night and wished he could simply kiss it better, wished he knew what was wrong. Later, he would come to find that sometimes you had to be very careful what you wished for...

entry.summary:

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,397Chapters: 3/24Kudos: 37

Summary: When Eddie suddenly finds himself in debt and is desperate to prove his worth as a father, he decides to take on secret jobs as a male escort, all while hiding his new life from Christopher, his friends, and especially from Buck, the man who may always have been his true home.

entry.title: let me have this (madforyou)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,842Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: The guy’s hand drops to Buck’s waist and grips it—tight.Eddie doesn’t mean to say anything. Honestly. He’s planning on standing there like a sane person, drinking his beer, minding his own business.But that hand stays exactly where it shouldn’t, and Buck laughs like he doesn’t feel it, and the words slip out before Eddie even knows he’s opened his mouth.“Oh fuck no.”Or,After Buck's friend bails on him, he invites Eddie to come with him to a themed event at a bar - a gay bar, as it turns out. After watching Buck flirt all night, Eddie takes matters into his own hands and shows Buck who he really belongs to.

entry.title: AL's Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Lounananana

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,138Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 87

Summary: Albert is back in L.A., and he’s just met an absolute angel of a firefighter—cute, gorgeous, kind, and hot. “An angel from the 105?” Chimney says. “Let me ask probie—he just pulled a shift over there.”  Meanwhile, Ravi can’t seem to shake a certain flirtatious playboy. No matter where he goes, it’s like the guy is haunting him.All he knows is that the guy's name is AL.

entry.title: Shattered Memories
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,139Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 20

Summary: Buck witnesses a murder while off duty and becomes the only person who can identify the killer. But before he can tell anyone what he saw, a suspicious car accident leaves him with severe amnesia. Now Buck can’t remember his name, his job, or the people who love him. As the 118, Athena, Maddie, and the rest of his family try to help him piece his life back together, Buck finds himself drawn again and again to Eddie and Christopher — even if he can’t understand why. The killer knows Buck is still alive. And the closer Buck gets to remembering the truth, the more dangerous things become.

entry.title: break the seal
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,533Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Buck stares blankly back at him, looking dazed and wide-eyed. He glances down at himself and back up at Eddie.Confused, Eddie takes an unsteady step in Buck's direction."Uh-oh," Buck gulps, Adam's apple bobbing thickly as he looks down at himself again and starts to pee.The one where Buck has an accident on the way home from the bar and Eddie fucks him in an alley about it.

entry.title: The Minute That Wouldn’t End
entry.summary:
Author: lako

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,905Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 245

Summary: A deeply tired, ugly little part of Eddie wanted to know what would happen if he simply sat down on the apparatus floor and bled through his shirt. Would they notice then? Or would he have to actually pass out first? He hated that thought as soon as he had it. It wasn’t fair. They loved Buck because Buck was lovable, because he was family, because he had just been kidnapped and tortured and dragged through hell. Eddie loved him too. Maybe more than was good for him. Certainly more than was wise. And if Eddie had made himself harder to care for, then that wasn’t on them. Note: Now that we’ve survived the finale, I’ve decided to change part of my story and shift the flow a little. So to my loyal readers — you may want to start rereading from Chapter 9 so everything connects better from there.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My advice is always ruin the friendship (Better that than regret it for all time)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,280Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 349

Summary: He looked down, shocked to see Christopher’s number displayed across his screen. They had texted occasionally, but it had been over six years since they last saw each other, and since Christopher never called him, something was clearly wrong. “Chris?” “Hey Buck, I know it's been a while, and I’m sorry to be so blunt, but Dad was hurt in a fire six weeks ago and has been in a coma ever since.” The color drains from Buck’s face. “I begged them to let him fight, but they won’t listen. Grandma and Abuelo, they want to…” He doesn’t let Christopher finish, “Christopher, is your dad dead?” He braces himself for the answer. It may have been over six years, but deep down, Buck’s feelings for his former partner have never changed. “No, because they aren’t in Dad’s power of attorney, you are.” Christopher tells him, “They tried to hide his will, but when they suggested pulling the plug, the hospital contacted the fire station that Dad works at, just to verify, and his captain turned it over. They couldn’t remove life support because they need you to sign off. I need you too…” Buck doesn’t even hear the last part as he’s sucked into his own thoughts.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 904,945Chapters: 91/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 667,719Chapters: 84/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

entry.title: You're the Best Thing in My Life
entry.summary:
Author: Frawg_Spawn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,309Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 210

Summary: "Jesus, Buck," Eddie gasps when he's finally cleared all the liquid from his windpipe. "Why'd you say that?""I dunno." Buck ducks his head sheepishly. "I was trying to be cute.""That wasn't cute. That was attempted murder."~Or, 3 times Buck calls Eddie daddy and thinks he might be into it and 1 time he finds out it's true
